name: @kontor/sdk-native
description: React Native (JSI) backend for @kontor/sdk — native bindings over core/kontor-mobile (uniffi). Provides the same KontorBackend surface as the WASM component, so @kontor/sdk runs on iOS/Android.
author: Unspendable Labs <dev@unspendablelabs.com>

scripts.//: Native binaries are produced by build-mobile.sh (uniffi-bindgen-react-native + cargo). See README.
scripts.//ubrn-bug: ubrn's cli.cjs runs `cargo run` (debug), and ubrn 0.29.3-1 + clap 4.6 hits a debug_assert on a `default_value`-on-bool arg. Disabling dev debug-assertions neutralizes it without patching ubrn.
scripts.//ubrn-generate: `ubrn generate all` needs a compiled host library to read the uniffi metadata from — the script builds it, locates it, then generates.
scripts.//ubrn-build: No --and-generate: bindings are generated once by ubrn:generate (build-mobile.sh and CI both run it explicitly) instead of once per platform build. `--profile mobile` is the size/perf-tuned release profile in core/Cargo.toml; keep in sync with build-mobile.sh.
scripts.ubrn:build:ios: CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG_ASSERTIONS=false uniffi-bindgen-react-native build ios --config ubrn.config.yaml --profile mobile
scripts.ubrn:build:android: CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG_ASSERTIONS=false uniffi-bindgen-react-native build android --config ubrn.config.yaml --profile mobile
scripts.//prepack: The published tarball must carry the prebuilt binaries (consumers cannot build them: core/ is outside the package). Refuse to pack without them.
scripts.prepack: test -d KontorSdkNativeFramework.xcframework && test -d android/src/main/jniLibs || { echo 'ERROR: native binaries missing — run ./build-mobile.sh before packing/publishing.' >&2; exit 1; }
